_doc: Category 4 — unix-cmd (chmod). Primary fix prefixes chmod with shx. On Windows the call is a silent no-op (no executable bit). No native CMD/PowerShell equivalent exists — those fallbacks are not applicable. Bash family keeps chmod as-is.

after._notes: If the executable bit must be set explicitly during Windows-local development, replace shx chmod with a Node script: const { chmodSync } = require('node:fs'); chmodSync('src/index.ts', 0o755);
